items.title: Divided Sudan, Elusive Peace
items.summary: For nearly three years, the two sides in Sudan’s civil war have fought bitterly for supremacy. Their conflict has devastated the country, with the risks of long-term partition and spillover continuing to grow. The outside powers with influence must keep striving for a diplomatic solution.
